# Nmap

```zsh
PORT   STATE SERVICE REASON  VERSION
139/tcp open  netbios-ssn Samba smbd 4
445/tcp open  netbios-ssn Samba smbd 4
```

---

# Enumeration

## 総合列挙

- smbmapで、DeveloperがREAD onlyとなっていることを確認
```sh
┌──(koshi㉿kali)-[~/Exam/Lucky]
┌──(koshi㉿kali)-[~/Exam/Lucky]
└─$ smbmap -H $TargetIP                                     ...
SMBMap - Samba Share Enumerator v1.10.7 | Shawn Evans - ShawnDEvans@gmail.com
                     https://github.com/ShawnDEvans/smbmap

[*] Detected 1 hosts serving SMB                                                                                                  
[*] Established 1 SMB connections(s) and 0 authenticated session(s)                                                 
[+] IP: 192.168.104.112:445     Name: 192.168.104.112           Status: NULL Session
        Disk                                                    Permissions     Comment
        ----                                                    -----------     -------
        Developer                                               READ ONLY       Developer Files
        IPC$                                                    NO ACCESS       IPC Service (Samba 4.13.14-Ubuntu)
[*] Closed 1 connections                                   
                                     
```

## Developer share

- smbclientで接続する
```sh
┌──(koshi㉿kali)-[~/Exam/Lucky]
└─$ smbclient --no-pass \\\\$TargetIP\\Developer
Anonymous login successful
Try "help" to get a list of possible commands.
smb: \> ls
  .                                   D        0  Thu Jan 13 00:06:22 2022
  ..                                  D        0  Thu Jan 13 00:06:22 2022

                15929256 blocks of size 1024. 6657372 blocks available
smb: \> mask ""
smb: \> recurse on
smb: \> ls
  .                                   D        0  Thu Jan 13 00:06:22 2022
  ..                                  D        0  Thu Jan 13 00:06:22 2022

                15929256 blocks of size 1024. 6657372 blocks available
smb: \> 
```


---
